scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run preview"
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
